payload.shortDescEn: Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Product DescriptionThe iPE exhaust system for the Ferrari 296 GTB is crafted from T304 stainless steel, matching OEM standards while enhancing performance and sound...
payload.longDescEn: Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Product DescriptionThe iPE exhaust system for the Ferrari 296 GTB is crafted from T304 stainless steel, matching OEM standards while enhancing performance and sound. This system includes both the catalytic converter and valvetronic components, reducing weight by 14.7% (2.75kg).Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Exhaust system productdetails▶ Catted Downpipe :▸ Catted Downpipe▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield▶ Catless Downpipe:▸ Catless Downpipe▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield▶ Stainless steel Back System:▸ Electric Valvetronic Muffler▸Stainless Steel Heat Shield▶Titanium Cat Back System※This model is remain with factory exhaust valve system※This model reused factory muffler outlet pipe and tips※Please confirm OPF/Non OPF version before placing an order
payload.bodyHtmlEn:
Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Product Description

The iPE exhaust system for the Ferrari 296 GTB is crafted from T304 stainless steel, matching OEM standards while enhancing performance and sound. This system includes both the catalytic converter and valvetronic components, reducing weight by 14.7% (2.75kg).

Ferrari 296 GTB Exhaust System Exhaust system productdetails

▶ Catted Downpipe :
▸ Catted Downpipe

▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield

▶ Catless Downpipe:

▸ Catless Downpipe

▸ Stainless Steel Heat Shield
▶ Stainless steel Back System:

▸ Electric Valvetronic Muffler

▸Stainless Steel Heat Shield

▶Titanium Cat Back System

※This model is remain with factory exhaust valve system

※This model reused factory muffler outlet pipe and tips

※Please confirm OPF/Non OPF version before placing an order

payload.shortDescEn: The timeless beauty of the Ferrari 458 Italia / Spider from Bella Italia is undeniable. In combination with our F1 Exhaust system, horsepower and torque can be increased significantly. Moreover, our choice of material, refined design...
payload.longDescEn: The timeless beauty of the Ferrari 458 Italia / Spider from Bella Italia is undeniable. In combination with our F1 Exhaust system, horsepower and torque can be increased significantly. Moreover, our choice of material, refined design, and dedication to detail all add up to the incomparable racing sound of iPE.Our high end exhaust system consists of a set of headers, a Valvetronic muffler, and a dual exit system, which produces a lower sound at the low speed range, while it impresses with pure racing sound at high rpm.*MaterialsHere at iPE Exhaust we believe in the absolute best materials for every application, chosenenvironment friendly by the Sandblasting 304 properties on our catback system. For theSand-blasting exhaust boutique, of course we also offer 304 stainless steel as analternative on other products. Every material has its own perfect application based onweight, strength, heat resistance, and chemical stability. Sand-blasting We have developed our own proprietary for the enviroment friendly usage. Adding a layer ofsand to our catback system will reduce heat soak, and the same strength, heat resistance,and chemical stability as the stainless steel. All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer! 2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.*Cat Pipe/Cat-bypass Pipe section ONLY fit with iPE Catback System
payload.bodyHtmlEn:
The timeless beauty of the Ferrari 458 Italia / Spider from Bella Italia is undeniable. In combination with our F1 Exhaust system, horsepower and torque can be increased significantly. Moreover, our choice of material, refined design, and dedication to detail all add up to the incomparable racing sound of iPE.
Our high end exhaust system consists of a set of headers, a Valvetronic muffler, and a dual exit system, which produces a lower sound at the low speed range, while it impresses with pure racing sound at high rpm.

*Materials

Here at iPE Exhaust we believe in the absolute best materials for every application, chosen
environment friendly by the Sandblasting 304 properties on our catback system. For the
Sand-blasting exhaust boutique, of course we also offer 304 stainless steel as an
alternative on other products. Every material has its own perfect application based on
weight, strength, heat resistance, and chemical stability.


Sand-blasting


We have developed our own proprietary for the enviroment friendly usage. Adding a layer of
sand to our catback system will reduce heat soak, and the same strength, heat resistance,
and chemical stability as the stainless steel.

All standard tips comes with chrome silver tips. Other colors are value-added.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.
*Cat Pipe/Cat-bypass Pipe section ONLY fit with iPE Catback System

payload.shortDescEn: *Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.The Ferrari 488 GTB / SPIDER V8 3.9 litre twin turbo combined with an iPE system...
payload.longDescEn: *Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.The Ferrari 488 GTB / SPIDER V8 3.9 litre twin turbo combined with an iPE system, excels in every imaginable aspect with extremely loud and aggressive high pitch like sounds for anyone behind the steering wheel who is searching for a spirited driving experience. Our aim is to bring back the Italian supercar character by giving it that certain tone. We accepted this challenge and created our own masterpiece in order to make the V8 sound like a racing automobile symphony. Our outstanding design with precision craftsmanship has refine all aspects of the exhaust sound. The most significant feature is the deep rumble from idle at low revs through to high pitch F1 excitement at mid-range then to intense high growling sound at high revs ranges, with some burbles when lifting off the throttle which emphasises the characteristics of that trademark V8 growl.With the Ferrari V8 engine design, we started off with a 200 cell high-flow sport catalysts down pipe to further increase flow efficiency however at the same time being environmentally conscious, in addition prevent any check engine light, and then flow through our uniquely designed double c-pipe in order to maintain a smoother cleaner louder tone to maintain that automobile symphony. Our full Valvetronic exhaust system delivers both enjoyable pure adrenaline racing sound and factory like regulations, all accessible and integrated via the Manettino switch. Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit onto the Ferrari 488 and to create a unique and breath-taking sound that will trickle those feelings and senses, sending them into your consciousness, giving you a bit of freedom away from the busy stressful working environment or for drivers who want a bit of attention grabbing sound.WARNING-It shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by installation without heat protectors around tips.iPE won't be responsible for  in case of any accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses with our our heatprotectors.Color chromatism may occur between the picture shown and the actual product, buyer awareness is advised.  Please check with our sales personnel for more information.WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer! 2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.*Cat Pipe/Cat-bypass Pipe section ONLY fit with iPE Catback System
payload.bodyHtmlEn:
*Please confirm whether your car has an “OPF system” before placing an order.

The Ferrari 488 GTB / SPIDER V8 3.9 litre twin turbo combined with an iPE system, excels in every imaginable aspect with extremely loud and aggressive high pitch like sounds for anyone behind the steering wheel who is searching for a spirited driving experience. Our aim is to bring back the Italian supercar character by giving it that certain tone. We accepted this challenge and created our own masterpiece in order to make the V8 sound like a racing automobile symphony. Our outstanding design with precision craftsmanship has refine all aspects of the exhaust sound. The most significant feature is the deep rumble from idle at low revs through to high pitch F1 excitement at mid-range then to intense high growling sound at high revs ranges, with some burbles when lifting off the throttle which emphasises the characteristics of that trademark V8 growl.
With the Ferrari V8 engine design, we started off with a 200 cell high-flow sport catalysts down pipe to further increase flow efficiency however at the same time being environmentally conscious, in addition prevent any check engine light, and then flow through our uniquely designed double c-pipe in order to maintain a smoother cleaner louder tone to maintain that automobile symphony. Our full Valvetronic exhaust system delivers both enjoyable pure adrenaline racing sound and factory like regulations, all accessible and integrated via the Manettino switch. Each part of the exhaust system is individually designed to perfectly fit onto the Ferrari 488 and to create a unique and breath-taking sound that will trickle those feelings and senses, sending them into your consciousness, giving you a bit of freedom away from the busy stressful working environment or for drivers who want a bit of attention grabbing sound.

WARNING-It shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by installation without heat protectors around tips.iPE won't be responsible for in case of any accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses with our our heatprotectors.

Color chromatism may occur between the picture shown and the actual product, buyer awareness is advised. Please check with our sales personnel for more information.

WARNING - Please read these disclosures carefully prior to your installation!

1.Improper adjustments made during installation may result in short-term to permanent damages to the iPE exhaust system and/or your vehicle.
iPE will not be held responsible for any damages to the vehicle, and warranties on our products will be voided if the damages occurred due to improper installation.If you have any trouble installing the system please contact your authorized dealer!

2. The manufacturer, importer or dealer shall not be liable for any incidental damage including personal injury or any other damages caused by improper installation or operation of the iPE exhaust system. When installing the iPE exhaust system be careful that the exhaust system does not touch other parts sensitive to high temperature.

3. iPE makes no representation or warranties with regard to damage caused by the improper installation, use and maintenance of the iPE exhaust system. The warranty is limited to defects recognized by our technical department and of normal use only, and excludes items subject to normal wear and tear(gaskets and damping wool). The warranty is voided in case of accidents, modifications, improper or competition uses.

Actual product may vary due to product enhancement. iPE reserves the right to revise, change, explain the product.
*Cat Pipe/Cat-bypass Pipe section ONLY fit with iPE Catback System
